description: DefiLlama offers two ways to use our data with AI:

novel_features.name: Compound workflows
novel_features.description: Run multi-step DefiLlama workflows that combine API operations for agent-friendly analysis.

novel_features.name: Offline analytics
novel_features.description: Query locally synced DefiLlama data for repeatable analysis without re-fetching every endpoint.

novel_features.name: Live/local search
novel_features.description: Search across synced DefiLlama data or live API resources from one command.
